mascotCharacter.name: Talip the Turtle
mascotCharacter.description: A whimsical, neumorphic turtle mascot character that guides users through GIS exploration with playful personality and tactile depth cues.
mascotCharacter.creator: Stitch Engine v3.0

default.context: General UI element, welcome screens, empty states

thinking.context: Loading states, data analysis, decision points

celebrating.context: Success messages, achievement unlocked, completion celebrations

verification.neumorphicCompliance: ✅ Yes — Soft shadows, beveled highlights, monochromatic base with accent colors
verification.whimsicalCompliance: ✅ Yes — Hand-drawn shell pattern, playful expression, floating tail, blush marks
verification.accessibilityCompliance: ✅ Yes — SVGs include <title> and <desc>, scalable, works in light/dark/high-contrast modes

usageGuidelines.scaling: SVG scales perfectly to any size
usageGuidelines.colorAdaptation: Base green works in light, dark, and high-contrast modes. Outline color adjusts for contrast.

neumorphicDetails.shellGradient: radial gradient (center light teal to dark teal)

whimsicalDetails.easterEggs: Tail waves independently; mascot 'watches' user interaction
